title: Simple Hud
description: Display on your HUD the FPS, Coordinates, and Ping
body:
# Simple Hud

This mod displays **FPS**, **Coordinates**, and **Ping** on the HUD.  
It is fully customizable through the `simplehud.json` file in the `config` folder or via the Mod Menu.  
  
![Ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cd4257b1b8579f16d778b8ba896eba55ca67ed2.png)


If you want more features for your HUD, feel free to check out my other mod, [Ultimate Hud](https://modrinth.com/mod/ultimatehud).  
  
_if there are any issues, please report them on_ [GitHub](https://github.com/Natxo09/Fabric-Mods/issues).
